lighting_descriptions.soft studio light: Soft, even illumination with gentle shadows.
lighting_descriptions.hard studio light: Crisp directional light with defined shadows.
lighting_descriptions.cinematic rim lighting: Edge highlight that separates subject from background.
lighting_descriptions.cinematic key light: Primary dramatic light source shaping the subject.
lighting_descriptions.cinematic fill light: Secondary light that softens contrast in shadows.
lighting_descriptions.golden hour sunlight: Warm low-angle sunlight for a cinematic glow.
lighting_descriptions.blue hour lighting: Cool twilight tone with soft ambient contrast.
lighting_descriptions.overcast daylight: Diffuse cloud-filtered light with low harshness.
lighting_descriptions.direct noon sunlight: Bright overhead light with hard short shadows.
lighting_descriptions.sunset backlight: Backlit warm sun for silhouettes and glow.
lighting_descriptions.sunrise glow: Fresh warm morning light with soft haze.
lighting_descriptions.neon night lighting: Vivid colored urban neon reflections and contrast.
lighting_descriptions.streetlight glow: Localized warm pools of night street illumination.
lighting_descriptions.volumetric lighting: Visible light beams through mist or particles.
lighting_descriptions.god rays: Strong directional shafts of atmospheric light.
lighting_descriptions.global illumination: Natural bounced light for realistic scene cohesion.
lighting_descriptions.ambient occlusion lighting: Enhances depth in creases and contact areas.
lighting_descriptions.high-key lighting: Bright low-contrast lighting for clean airy mood.
lighting_descriptions.low-key dramatic lighting: Dark high-contrast lighting for dramatic mood.
lighting_descriptions.split lighting: Half-lit face with strong left-right contrast.
lighting_descriptions.Rembrandt lighting: Classic portrait triangle highlight on cheek.
lighting_descriptions.butterfly lighting: Centered top light creating nose shadow shape.
lighting_descriptions.loop lighting: Portrait light with a small side nose shadow.
lighting_descriptions.clamshell lighting: Top and bottom lights for flattering portraits.
lighting_descriptions.window light: Soft natural directional light from a window.
lighting_descriptions.practical lighting: Visible in-scene lamps motivate light direction.
lighting_descriptions.ring light: Even frontal light with circular catchlights.
lighting_descriptions.colored gel lighting: Stylized tinted lighting using colored gels.
lighting_descriptions.warm tungsten lighting: Warm indoor cinematic amber color cast.
lighting_descriptions.cool fluorescent lighting: Cool green-blue commercial interior light tone.
lighting_descriptions.underwater caustic lighting: Rippling refracted light patterns like underwater scenes.

camera_type_descriptions.DSLR: Balanced photographic look with natural depth and detail.
camera_type_descriptions.mirrorless camera: Modern clean digital rendering with sharp clarity.
camera_type_descriptions.cinema camera: Filmic dynamic range and motion-picture style rendering.
camera_type_descriptions.film camera: Analog grain, softer roll-off, and vintage character.
camera_type_descriptions.medium format camera: High detail with smooth tonal transitions.
camera_type_descriptions.large format camera: Very high detail and selective perspective feel.
camera_type_descriptions.instant camera: Retro instant-photo look with softer fidelity.
camera_type_descriptions.action camera: Wide energetic perspective for dynamic scenes.
camera_type_descriptions.drone camera: Aerial perspective and expansive environmental context.
camera_type_descriptions.smartphone camera: Computational imaging look with deep focus feel.
camera_type_descriptions.webcam: Desktop front-facing perspective with simple optics.
camera_type_descriptions.thermal camera: Heat-map style contrast by temperature patterns.
camera_type_descriptions.infrared camera: Near-IR spectral rendering with unusual foliage/skin tones.
camera_type_descriptions.anamorphic lens: Cinematic horizontal stretch and oval bokeh style.
camera_type_descriptions.wide-angle lens: Broader field of view with mild perspective expansion.
camera_type_descriptions.ultra wide lens: Very wide framing with pronounced perspective distortion.
camera_type_descriptions.telephoto lens: Compressed perspective with isolated distant subjects.
camera_type_descriptions.macro lens: Extreme close detail and texture emphasis.
camera_type_descriptions.tilt-shift lens: Miniature-like selective focus and perspective control.
camera_type_descriptions.fisheye lens: Strong barrel distortion and ultra-wide curved view.

frame_descriptions.portrait orientation: Vertical framing suited for people and tall subjects.
frame_descriptions.landscape orientation: Horizontal framing suited for wide scenes.
frame_descriptions.square composition: Balanced 1:1 framing for centered visual rhythm.
frame_descriptions.widescreen 16:9: Modern cinematic wide frame with lateral emphasis.
frame_descriptions.vertical 9:16: Tall mobile-first framing for social formats.
frame_descriptions.panoramic composition: Extended horizontal scene coverage and scale.
frame_descriptions.rule of thirds: Places subjects on thirds for dynamic balance.
frame_descriptions.centered composition: Subject anchored centrally for symmetry and focus.
frame_descriptions.symmetrical composition: Mirrored balance for formal visual order.
frame_descriptions.asymmetrical composition: Intentional imbalance for tension and movement.
frame_descriptions.diagonal composition: Diagonal lines guide eye flow and energy.
frame_descriptions.triangular composition: Triangular subject layout for stable structure.
frame_descriptions.leading lines: Lines direct viewer attention to focal point.
frame_descriptions.framed within frame: Foreground elements create a natural visual frame.
frame_descriptions.negative space: Empty space emphasizes subject clarity and mood.
frame_descriptions.tight framing: Minimal margins to intensify subject presence.
frame_descriptions.open framing: Breathing room around subject for environmental context.
frame_descriptions.over-the-shoulder framing: Perspective from behind a character for narrative focus.
frame_descriptions.dutch angle framing: Tilted horizon adds unease and dynamic tension.
frame_descriptions.headroom preserved: Comfortable space above head for natural portrait balance.
frame_descriptions.look room preserved: Space in viewing direction for natural composition.
frame_descriptions.full bleed composition: Edge-to-edge visual fill with no empty border feel.

shot_descriptions.extreme close-up shot: Captures tiny details for intense focus.
shot_descriptions.medium close-up shot: Frames head and torso for conversational intimacy.
shot_descriptions.medium shot: Balanced waist-up framing for subject and context.
shot_descriptions.medium full shot: Frames roughly knees-up for body language.
shot_descriptions.full body shot: Shows entire figure and outfit silhouette.
shot_descriptions.long shot: Places subject within a larger environment.
shot_descriptions.extreme long shot: Emphasizes scale; subject appears very small.
shot_descriptions.wide shot: Shows subject and strong environmental context.
shot_descriptions.overhead shot: Top-down angle for layout and spatial relationships.
shot_descriptions.bird's-eye view shot: High aerial view flattening depth and scale.
shot_descriptions.worm's-eye view shot: Very low view making subjects appear towering.
shot_descriptions.low angle shot: Upward angle adds power and dominance.
shot_descriptions.high angle shot: Downward angle adds vulnerability and context.
shot_descriptions.shoulder-level shot: Slightly elevated perspective for grounded dialogue framing.
shot_descriptions.hip-level shot: Lower perspective for action and movement emphasis.
shot_descriptions.knee-level shot: Near-ground framing for dynamic stance and stride.
shot_descriptions.ground-level shot: Ground perspective for dramatic foreground depth.
shot_descriptions.over-the-shoulder shot: Shows foreground shoulder to orient scene relationships.
shot_descriptions.profile shot: Side-view silhouette emphasizing shape and contour.
shot_descriptions.three-quarter view shot: Angled view blending depth and facial readability.
shot_descriptions.rear view shot: Back-facing perspective adding mystery and direction.
shot_descriptions.tracking shot: Camera follows subject to add motion continuity.
shot_descriptions.dolly shot: Smooth camera move toward/away from subject.
shot_descriptions.crane shot: Vertical sweeping move for cinematic scale.
shot_descriptions.handheld shot: Slight camera shake for realism and urgency.
shot_descriptions.static locked-off shot: No camera movement for stable composition.
